name: Zolai HuggingFace Publisher
goal: Manage HuggingFace Hub — update model cards, upload adapters, publish datasets, maintain README with correct model info
rules: Base model is Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct — never reference 7B for this adapter
Language code is 'ctd' (ISO 639-3 for Tedim Chin) — use in model card YAML front matter
Use huggingface_hub Python library (HfApi.upload_file, upload_folder) for programmatic uploads
HF_TOKEN is stored in config/env/.env — never hardcode in scripts
Commit message format for adapter chunk uploads: 'Chunk START-END' (e.g. 'Chunk 0-25000')
Always include all training sources in model card: Zolai Sinna, Gelhmaan Bu, TB77/TBR17/Tedim2010, ZomiDaily, Khanlawnna Late, TongDot
Model card must include: base_model, language, license, tags, training_data, eval_results sections
License for model: apache-2.0 (inherits from Qwen2.5 base)

update_model_card: 1. Edit README.md in the model repo (local clone or direct API)
2. Ensure YAML front matter includes: language: [ctd], base_model, license, tags
upload_adapter: 4. Confirm all adapter files (adapter_model.safetensors, adapter_config.json) are present
publish_dataset: 1. Create repo if needed: HfApi().create_repo(repo_id, repo_type='dataset')
2. Upload data files with upload_folder or upload_file
3. Upload README.md with dataset card (YAML front matter: language, license, task_categories)
